_doc: Terminal FAILURE snapshot. Per the A3 robust rule (04-05-LIVE-PROBE.md), any state containing 'Completed' that is NOT 'Succeeded' is a terminal failure -> fall to next candidate, else mark the gap stuck (D-02). state='Completed, Errored' is the inferred failure family (only the success family 'Completed, Succeeded' was observed live; the substring rule, not an unobserved exact literal, is authoritative) — see app/adapters/slskd.py:STATE_FAILED.
